text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 7 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 1. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Since the beginning the time from the dark
There emerged one true light
We would hail as the prettiest star
With a reverence that will endure
That we use as a spiritual guide
For all time
With a glow in a halo of trust
We exalt in its shadow
We harbor all fear

That we are blessed with celestial skies to inspire
With a gift that like time
Seems to be infinitе, so eternal
Our life has bеcome...
That the future far reaches the past
And at last
We will know that
Whatever's bestowed on us all
We can follow the prettiest star
 

Trivia

A choral arrangement of “Instabilite: Orchestre” from Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance’s score, which itself is based on “Anchuumosaku” from 1997’s TV anime His and Her Circumstances, also scored by Shiro Sagisu and directed by Hideaki Anno. https://genius.com/Shiro-sagisu-prettiest-star-lyrics
